Looking at the class diagram, `MermaidValidationPipeline` has methods `validate`, `validateFull`, `getParseValidator`, `generateReport`, and `summarize`. The diagram shows `QualityValidator` exists with a `validate` method, but there are no arrows or relationships drawn between `MermaidValidationPipeline` and `QualityValidator` in the diagram. The diagram only shows structural composition and inheritance — it doesn't specify which pipeline methods internally call which validator methods.
